are you able to commit to w2, 40-hr/week, full-time, seeing patients 5 days per week? (32 hours of clinical patient-facing work, and 8 hrs of administrative time). are you legally authorized to work in the united states?

please indicate which type of position (w2, full-time, part-time) you'd be most interested in. (please select all that apply to you). we don't currently offer 1099 or part-time roles for apps at this time and if you choose this option, we will keep your application on file for future needs.
do you currently hold an oma certification (caeom)? are you legally authorized to work in the united states?
do you have experience practicing in a telehealth or digital health setting, particularly in a fast-paced environment? are you legally authorized to work in the united states?

please provide a link to your linkedin profile.

please include three (3) professional references. please include full name, title, company where you have worked together, work relationship, email and phone number. this helps streamline the later stages of the process. we’ll only contact references for candidates who reach the final stages, and by providing them, you consent to us reaching out at that time.
